checks.name: telegram_diagnostics
checks.detail: Installer diagnostics now distinguish Node HTTPS transport-specific Bot API failure from invalid token and explain why Telegram Desktop working does not prove Bot API HTTPS reachability.

checks.name: codex_websocket_warning
checks.detail: Codex websocket 403 is surfaced as a legitimate warning with explicit HTTP fallback wording instead of a misleading blocking failure.

checks.name: summary_and_next_steps_dedupe
checks.detail: Installer final summary and next steps no longer repeat pnpm dev, pairing instructions, or the same setup/doctor/verify warning set.

checks.name: miniapp_port_warning
checks.detail: Mini App port 3001 remains a truthful external conflict warning with concrete override guidance.

checks.name: regression_coverage
checks.detail: Targeted regression tests and full lint/typecheck/test/release-check validation passed for the scoped diagnostics changes.

checks.name: proof_bundle
checks.detail: The proof bundle now includes task metadata, evidence artifacts, verifier findings, and a final passed verdict.
